# cancelRequest(withError:)

**Instance Method**

Cancels the action and returns the provided error.

## Declaration

```swift
func cancelRequest(withError error: any Error)
```

## Discussion

Call this method if the action fails. Set the error’s domain to [doc://com.apple.fileproviderui/documentation/FileProviderUI/FPUIErrorDomain]. Set the error code to a [doc://com.apple.fileproviderui/documentation/FileProviderUI/FPUIExtensionErrorCode] value.

## Completing the Action

- **completeRequest()**: Marks the action as complete.
